scrape_notes: Instagram blocks automated scraping. Data extracted from Google search index snippets, meta descriptions, and search engine cached titles of individual posts. Not all 361 posts could be individually accessed; data represents what search engines have indexed.

pricing_mentions.notes: No direct pricing visible in indexed post captions. Typical for Indian jewelry stores on Instagram - they use 'DM for price' model or direct customers to visit store. Pricing depends on daily gold rate, weight, and making charges.
pricing_mentions.price_range_inferred: Mid to Premium (based on Google Maps business data and Vijayawada market positioning)

inferred: 22K Gold (standard for South Indian jewelry stores)
gold_purity_mentions.notes: 22K (916) gold is the standard for traditional South Indian jewelry. 18K commonly used for diamond-studded pieces.

weight_mentions.inferred: Harams typically 30-150 grams. Bridal sets 100-300 grams total. Lightweight daily wear 5-20 grams.
weight_mentions.notes: No specific gram weights found in indexed captions

tone_style.overall_tone: Premium, aspirational, culturally rooted with modern appeal
tone_style.language_style: English-language captions with elegant, descriptive phrases. Uses short impactful statements. Mixes cultural pride with luxury positioning.

Aspiration and growth ('Going Bigger, Brighter, Grander')
Product excellence and craftsmanship ('Exquisite haram', 'Unmatched craftsmanship')
New collections and launches ('All new Black Diamond collection')
Trust and luxury ('Luxury you can trust')
tone_style.posting_format: Primarily Reels (video content) showcasing jewelry pieces, likely with close-up product shots, model/lifestyle shots, and store ambiance content
tone_style.posting_frequency: ~361 posts total - approximately 2-3 posts per week (consistent for a local jewelry store)
tone_style.engagement_style: Product showcase reels, collection announcements, brand story content, likely occasional festive/occasion-based posts

content_pillars: Event / Store Announcements (expansion, sales, grand events)
instagram_strategy_observations.video_first_notes: All indexed posts are Reels, suggesting a strong video-first strategy consistent with Instagram's algorithm preference
instagram_strategy_observations.caption_style: Short, punchy opening lines followed by descriptive product/brand text. Uses ellipsis (...) to create curiosity and encourage reading more.
instagram_strategy_observations.hashtag_strategy: Hashtags not visible in Google-indexed snippets but likely include: #GoldJewellery #DiamondJewellery #Vijayawada #BridalJewellery #TempleJewellery #SouthIndianJewellery #22KGold #Haram #TraditionalJewellery #DeviShresta #GoldAndDiamonds
instagram_strategy_observations.call_to_action: Likely uses DM-based inquiry model, store visit prompts, and phone number for direct contact

competitive_context.position: Local favourite / trusted neighborhood jeweler competing against national chains
